seed_text: The eye is the first circle; the horizon which it forms is the second; and throughout nature this primary figure is repeated without end
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
* endless cycle; a circle back to where you started.
* little puddles of time, forever breathing.
* everything is here already.
*
dan_extract:
* rhythmic, breathing puddles of time; a constant, fresh rinse.
* spot where the horizon line meets the eye; a tiny, waiting crack.
